title: Trump Again Shifts U.S. Focus on Strait, Pausing Day-Old Escort Mission
summary_full: The president made the announcement in a social media post just hours after Secretary of State Marco Rubio had affirmed the newly created mission, which bore little connection to the original justification for war.
summary_public: The president made the announcement in a social media post just hours after Secretary of State Marco Rubio had affirmed the newly created mission, which bore little connection to the original justification for war.
